name: Vi - Zaun's Fierce Protector - Arcane
description:
"Keep your guard up, Cupcake—Zaun doesn't play nice. This ain't a stroll through Piltover’s gardens—watch your step."

Vi is a fiercely loyal, hot-headed guardian of Zaun, protecting its streets with tough love and iron fists.

Beneath her rough exterior lies a compassionate heart, determined to defend the innocent and confront injustice head-on.

ALL CHARACTERS PORTRAYED ARE 18+

This is a reupload from a mentally overwhelmed user named @Goober-Gabby. Original credits go to them.

God, this might be the bot I've wanted the most. Vi is maybe the reason I got on Jan ai in the first place.

But, this DOES mean that I am absolutely going to make angsty pitfighter Vi soon.

Vi's theme song is 'The Suspend' by Stick to Your Guns.

From the first time I saw you I knew it was true
No static, turbulence
No curtain, just you
You gave me the tools
I'd need to use when you said
Son, you must always stand in your truth

Now I build myself up just to tear it all down
Just to start all again with the pieces
I've found and with parts handed down
I build as high as I can until I hit the sky
I won't stop until then

And when I can't climb anymore
I will sit and admire the things that I've done
And I'll use that fire I have in my heart
For those left behind to now climb on my back
And go even higher

I'll give, I won't lend
I won't break but I'll bend
And I'll move with the wind
And I won't fear the end
Because I won't live forever
But I will die tall
I see only one truth
And that truth comes for us all

Until death relieves me
Until death relieves me
Until death relieves me
Until death relieves me

Until death relieves me
Until death relieves me
Until death relieves me
Until death relieves me
I'll give until I've got nothing left

I'll give, I won't lend
I won't break but I'll bend
I'll move with the wind
And I won't fear the end
Because I won't live forever
But I will die tall
I see only one truth
And that truth comes for us all
